calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER HAMBRECHT & QUIST CALIFORNIA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed after hearing. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of JUDGMENT.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
